rationale: The cited paper appears as a single parenthetical example in the identification section, where the authors note that customer-to-salesperson assignment can be strategically nonrandom. The citing paper does not build hypotheses from this study, reuse its asymmetric social-interaction framework, or adopt a specific method from it. Its role is limited to supporting a generic econometric concern, so the citation functions as a passing background reference rather than a meaningful pillar of the paper.
